scripts.build: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm run build:dataview && pnpm run build:whiteboard && pnpm run build:whiteboard:app
scripts.build:shared: pnpm --filter @shared/core run build && pnpm --filter @shared/delta run build && pnpm --filter @shared/projection run build && pnpm --filter @shared/draft run build && pnpm --filter @shared/reducer run build && pnpm --filter @shared/mutation run build && pnpm --filter @shared/collab run build && pnpm --filter @shared/dom run build && pnpm --filter @shared/i18n run build && pnpm --filter @shared/react run build && pnpm --filter @shared/ui run build
scripts.build:whiteboard: pnpm --filter @whiteboard/core run build && pnpm --filter @whiteboard/engine run build && pnpm --filter @whiteboard/editor-scene run build && pnpm --filter @whiteboard/editor run build && pnpm --filter @whiteboard/react run build && pnpm --filter @whiteboard/collab run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:shared && pnpm run typecheck:dataview && pnpm run typecheck:whiteboard
scripts.typecheck:shared: pnpm --filter @shared/core run typecheck && pnpm --filter @shared/delta run typecheck && pnpm --filter @shared/projection run typecheck && pnpm --filter @shared/draft run typecheck && pnpm --filter @shared/reducer run typecheck && pnpm --filter @shared/mutation run typecheck && pnpm --filter @shared/collab run typecheck && pnpm --filter @shared/dom run typecheck && pnpm --filter @shared/i18n run typecheck && pnpm --filter @shared/react run typecheck && pnpm --filter @shared/ui run typecheck
scripts.typecheck:dataview: pnpm -C dataview run typecheck && pnpm -C dataview run demo:typecheck
scripts.typecheck:whiteboard: pnpm -C whiteboard run typecheck && pnpm -C apps/whiteboard run typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm run test:shared && pnpm run test:dataview && pnpm run test:whiteboard
scripts.test:shared: pnpm --filter @shared/core run test && pnpm --filter @shared/delta run test && pnpm --filter @shared/projection run test && pnpm --filter @shared/draft run test && pnpm --filter @shared/reducer run test && pnpm --filter @shared/mutation run test && pnpm --filter @shared/collab run test && pnpm --filter @shared/dom run test && pnpm --filter @shared/i18n run test && pnpm --filter @shared/react run test && pnpm --filter @shared/ui run test
